message:
test(conformance): expand ZADD combined option coverage

Adds ~40 tests for ZADD option combinations: NX+XX conflict,
GT+LT conflict, NX+GT/LT conflicts, XX+GT combined behavior,
XX+LT combined behavior, CH flag combinations, INCR option,
and case insensitivity verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
